items.title: Probability vs likelihood roles
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  model["Model f(x | theta)"]
  model --> probView["Probability view: fix theta, vary x"]
  model --> likeView["Likelihood view: fix x, vary theta"]
  probView --> norm["Masses/densities over x sum/integrate to 1"]
  likeView --> compare["Compare theta values; no normalization over theta"]
items.caption: One formula, two questions: how probable is x given θ, versus how well does θ explain observed x.

items.title: IID dataset to product likelihood
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  x1["x1"] --> f1["f(x1 | theta)"]
  x2["x2"] --> f2["f(x2 | theta)"]
  xn["xn"] --> fn["f(xn | theta)"]
  f1 --> prod["L(theta) = product of factors"]
  f2 --> prod
  fn --> prod
  prod --> logsum["ell(theta) = sum log f(xi | theta)"]
items.caption: Independent observations multiply into a joint likelihood; logs turn the product into a sum for optimization.

items.title: Likelihood in Bayes and MLE
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  prior["Prior P(theta)"]
  like["Likelihood L(theta) = P(data | theta)"]
  prior --> bayes["Posterior proportional to prior x likelihood"]
  like --> bayes
  like --> mle["MLE: argmax theta L(theta)"]
items.caption: Likelihood feeds both frequentist MLE and Bayesian updating via Bayes' theorem.
